decisions.decision: Use npm install instead of npm ci in Dockerfile
decisions.rationale: npm ci errors on EBADPLATFORM for cross-platform optional esbuild binaries; npm install skips them gracefully

decisions.decision: Use git merge -X ours for remote divergence
decisions.rationale: Remote had automated CI commit; our security-hardened version is authoritative; -X ours keeps our changes while incorporating remote

decisions.decision: Exclude infra files from coverage thresholds
decisions.rationale: db.ts (Postgres), gemini.ts (Gemini API), redis.ts (Redis), gmail-live.ts require live infra; unit-testable via integration tests

decisions.decision: HMAC-SHA256 over bcrypt/Argon2 for share password hash
decisions.rationale: Server-secret keyed HMAC provides equivalent security for server-side secrets; Argon2 would add latency and dependencies
Project has significant infra-dependent code; 97% is achievable after integration test harness is set up

decisions.decision: IPv6 private range blocking via DNS failure (not direct isPrivateIpv6 check)
decisions.rationale: WHATWG URL spec returns bracketed hostname [fc00::1] for IPv6 URLs; isIP() returns 0 for bracketed addresses; direct private-IP check unreachable; DNS lookup failure provides equivalent blocking

decisions.decision: V13 automation via GitHub CLI scripts rather than GitHub App
decisions.rationale: Simpler authentication; no app registration required; sufficient for project scale
